PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc -Force; Write-Output "PID $proc 종료 완료" } else { Write-Output "8080 포트 프로세스 없음" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, State | ForEach-Object { $_ | Add-Member -NotePropertyName ProcessName -NotePropertyValue \(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name -PassThru })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $pid8080 = $conn.OwningProcess; $name = \(Get-Process -Id $pid8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Name; Stop-Process -Id $pid8080 -Force; "Killed PID $pid8080 \($name\)" } else { "No process on 8080" })
